rationale: Gov't Code §2110.005 governs advisory committee reporting requirements for state agencies. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote:
A state agency that establishes an advisory committee shall by rule:
(1) state the purpose and tasks of the committee; and
(2) describe the manner in which the committee will report to the agency.
_note: The cited rule concerns advisory committee procedures and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
